name: uAvionix microLink — Aviation-Grade BVLOS C2 Radio
description: FCC and IC approved aviation-grade BVLOS C2 datalink radio specifically designed for long-range mission-critical UAS operations. Provides CNPC (Control and Non-Payload Communication) with 2x2 MIMO diversity. Integrates with SkyLine cloud-managed C2 service for multi-aircraft fleet management, path/link diversity, and seamless roaming between ground stations. TSO-C213a compliant. ISM 902-928 MHz band.
ndaa_note: uAvionix Corporation, Bigfork MT. US avionics company. NDAA compliant.

name: uAvionix muLTElink-5060 — Multi-Datalink ARS with LTE & C-Band
description: Multi-datalink Airborne Radio System (ARS) and Link Executive Manager providing simultaneous CNPC C2 over C-Band (5030-5091 MHz aviation protected spectrum), cellular LTE, and LEO satellite (Starlink compatible). Automatic link switching with 1-second evaluation cadence and double-hysteresis. Demonstrated in UK BVLOS trials with seamless handover across C-Band, cellular, and satcom in challenging coastal environments.
ndaa_note: uAvionix Corporation, Bigfork MT. US avionics company. NDAA compliant.

name: Silvus StreamCaster SC4200EP — Tactical MANET C2 Datalink
description: 2x2 MIMO tactical MANET radio delivering best-in-class C2, video, and telemetry in a single transceiver for unmanned systems. Proprietary MN-MIMO waveform provides self-healing, self-forming mesh networking with no operator involvement. Battle-proven across defense, law enforcement, and public safety deployments. Handles simultaneous video, C2, and health/telemetry data. NDAA and DoD cybersecurity compliant; approved for Blue UAS platforms.
form_factor: ruggedized enclosure or OEM PCB stack
ndaa_note: Silvus Technologies, Los Angeles CA. US MANET radio manufacturer. NDAA compliant. Multiple DoD contracts.

name: Silvus StreamCaster Lite SL5200 — Ultra-Low SWaP MANET for Group 1 UAS
description: Ultra-low SWaP OEM module delivering Group 2 UAV-level MANET radio performance in a form factor designed for Group 1 platforms. Powered by Silvus' proprietary MN-MIMO waveform for self-forming, self-healing mesh networking. Provides single-radio solution for simultaneous video, C2, and telemetry. Enables convoy, relay, and swarm capability between multiple manned and unmanned systems.
ndaa_note: Silvus Technologies, Los Angeles CA. US MANET radio manufacturer. NDAA compliant. Multiple DoD contracts.

name: CubePilot Herelink V1.1 — HD Video + C2 Datalink System
description: Integrated HD video transmission, data link, and ground control station system for drones. 2.4 GHz ISM band with up to 20 km range (FCC) / 12 km (CE). Dual HDMI inputs supporting 720p/1080p at 30/60fps with minimum 110ms latency. Android-based 5.46-inch 1080P touchscreen controller runs QGroundControl and MissionPlanner natively. Pinecone S1 processor (8-core). Widely adopted in ArduPilot/PX4 ecosystem.

name: Ultra I&C ADSI — Multi-Domain C2 Gateway
description: Multi-domain C2 gateway system communicating over dozens of tactical datalinks from Link 16 and NATO Link 1 to distributed systems datalinks. First CBC2 gateway to receive continuous Authority to Operate (cATO) from DoD, enabling autonomous software updates via DevSecOps pipeline. Supports Cursor on Target (CoT), JREAP-C translation, and rapid reconfiguration of tactical datalink interfaces. Cloud-enabled containerized architecture. Demonstrated NATO interoperability at CWIX 2024 in Poland.
ndaa_note: Ultra Electronics, UK. Allied-nation NDAA compliant. Part of Cobham Advanced Electronic Systems.

name: Performance Drone Works Blackwave — Next-Gen UAS Radio System
description: Next-generation radio system designed for critical UAS communications in contested and congested electromagnetic environments. Awarded a USSOCOM contract for development. Designed to provide resilient C2 links for tactical sUAS operations where standard datalinks are vulnerable to EW threats. AES-256 encrypted. Integrates with PDW's C100 Blue UAS platform.
ndaa_note: Performance Drone Works, Sarasota FL. US UAS C2 manufacturer. NDAA compliant.

name: Kutta Technologies KGS — Tactical UAS C2 Software Suite
description: Mission-critical hardware and software solutions for tactical drone C2. Selected by leading clients including the US Department of Defense. Provides interoperability between multiple UAS types and ground stations through standardized data interfaces. Supports STANAG 4586 compliant control of unmanned systems.
ndaa_note: Kutta Technologies, Phoenix AZ. US DoD C2 software company. NDAA compliant.

name: DTC BluSDR-90-UL — Ultra-Light Long-Range SDR for UAS
description: Ultra-light software-defined radio offering long-range mission-critical connectivity with battlefield-proven MeshUltra MANET networking. COFDM IP Mesh waveforms support adaptive modulation up to 64QAM with data rates to 87 Mbps. Frequency coverage 320 MHz to 6 GHz with selectable channel bandwidths from 1.25 to 20 MHz. Integrated with Nordic-Wing Astero ISR UAV with high-end encryption and anti-jamming. US Army, DOJ, DHS, and DOD contracts. 250,000+ radios built.
ndaa_note: DTC (Codan Communications), Adelaide, Australia. Allied-nation NDAA compliant. Major MANET supplier to Five Eyes nations.

name: DTC SOL8SDR-M BluCore — Miniature SDR for Nano/sUAS
description: Miniature software-defined radio transceiver at just 54x50x11mm and 60g, designed for sub-250g nano UAS and swarming drones. Supports MeshUltra MANET with 80+ nodes on same frequency. Self-healing, self-forming mesh enables swarm and mother/daughter UAS architectures. RF LOS ranges up to 250 km with optimized antenna and amplifier. Supports all DTC COFDM IP Mesh and unidirectional waveforms.
ndaa_note: DTC (Codan Communications), Adelaide, Australia. Allied-nation NDAA compliant. Major MANET supplier to Five Eyes nations.

name: L3Harris AMORPHOUS — Decentralized Swarm C2 Software
description: Software suite designed to control thousands of drones simultaneously through a decentralized system, eliminating reliance on a single mothership drone. Represents a significant leap in swarm technology where multiple drones operate in unison, autonomously adapting to battlefield conditions. Part of the broader L3Harris autonomous systems portfolio.
ndaa_note: L3Harris Technologies. US defense prime. NDAA compliant.

name: XTEND XOS — Tactical Drone Operating System for C2 Integration
description: Tactical drone operating system enabling intuitive control of small tactical drones in complex operational environments. Integrated into Lockheed Martin Skunk Works MDCX multi-domain C2 platform. Enables single operator to manage transitions between large carrier drone and small tactical drone within same mission context. Reduces cognitive burden and minimizes real-time points of failure. Demonstrated carrier-deployed drone operations with seamless C2 handoff.
datalink_type: Tactical drone OS / C2 integration layer
ndaa_note: XTEND, Tel Aviv, Israel. Allied-nation NDAA compliant. XOS tactical drone OS.

name: Shield AI Hivemind — AI Pilot for Autonomous UAS C2
description: AI-powered autonomous pilot technology for unmanned systems providing GPS-denied, comms-denied autonomous flight capability. Being integrated onto Navy BQM-177A subsonic aerial targets under OTA agreement for autonomous flight foundation. Enables autonomous teaming and cooperative engagement without continuous C2 link. Core technology for CCA (Collaborative Combat Aircraft) programs.
ndaa_note: Shield AI, San Diego CA. US AI autonomy company. NDAA compliant. DoD prime contractor.

name: Censys Cellular Datalink Upgrade
notes: Primary C2 for BVLOS. Range dependent on cellular coverage.

name: CASIA Long Range DAA (12-month activation)
notes: Forward-facing EO + ADS-B. Required for BVLOS waivers.
